sections.title: Contacting through NPC Contacts Random option

lines.speaker: Al Kharid Camel
lines.text: Well this is grand darling. How nice it is to make your acquaintance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. Nice to meet you too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a minute. How am I talking to you without a Camulet?

lines.speaker: Al Kharid Camel
lines.text: My dear, I'm a camel, how should I know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm. I suppose this spell must tap directly into your mind. So, there's no need for language to get in the way.

lines.speaker: Al Kharid Camel
lines.text: I think I am somewhat confused.

lines.speaker: Al Kharid Camel
lines.text: May one ask how you contacted me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just using one of the Lunar spells.

lines.speaker: Al Kharid Camel
lines.text: Oh my, oh my. These youngsters today and their new-fangled gadgets!
